query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, gameStatus, awayBookSpread, bookTotal, awayBookML, homeBookML, awayStartingPitcher, homeStartingPitcher, modeled, publishedToFeed, publishedModel FROM games WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate = '2026-03-29' ORDER BY id LIMIT 20;
